# Preface {.unnumbered}

This is a demo Quarto book showcasing the new RevealJS format support for books.

## About This Demo

This book demonstrates:

- Creating a Quarto book with multiple chapters
- Using both HTML and RevealJS output formats
- Navigation between different format outputs
- Integration of RevealJS presentations within a book structure

To learn more about Quarto books, visit <https://quarto.org/docs/books>.
